scripts.build:bundle:appimage: npm run icons:ensure && tauri build --bundles appimage
scripts.build:bundle:deb: npm run icons:ensure && tauri build --bundles deb
scripts.build:android:dev: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; sdk="${ANDROID_HOME:-${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$sdk" ] && [ -d "$sdk/build-tools" ]; then bt="$(ls -1 "$sdk/build-tools" | sort -V | tail -n1)"; if [ -n "$bt" ] && [ -x "$sdk/build-tools/$bt/apksigner" ]; then export PATH="$sdk/build-tools/$bt:$PATH"; fi; fi; tauri android build --debug --apk --target aarch64'
scripts.build:android:prod: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; sdk="${ANDROID_HOME:-${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -n "$sdk" ] && [ -d "$sdk/build-tools" ]; then bt="$(ls -1 "$sdk/build-tools" | sort -V | tail -n1)"; if [ -n "$bt" ] && [ -x "$sdk/build-tools/$bt/apksigner" ]; then export PATH="$sdk/build-tools/$bt:$PATH"; fi; fi; tauri android build --apk --target aarch64'
